overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark, rocky mountain path in a fantasy game setting. The player encounters a wolf standing in the trail before continuing through the pine forest under stormy skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon with high cliff walls on the left

entered.detail: tall dark rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation on the right side
cobblestone trail winding through the mountain terrain
tall evergreen trees visible in the distance ahead
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on the left and rocky ledges on the right. The cobblestone path winds ahead toward distant pine trees and mountain peaks under a dark overcast sky.

events.description: a large gray wolf appears standing in the middle of the path ahead
wolf moves to the left side of the path allowing the camera to pass

agents.ego_description: approaching the wolf cautiously while maintaining steady forward movement along the trail

notable_agents.action: wolf standing in the path facing the camera, then stepping aside to the left to let the player pass

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues through the canyon, a wolf appears standing in the path ahead. The camera approaches the animal, which stands its ground briefly before moving to the left side. The rocky walls recede slightly as the path continues.

events.description: trail transitions from rocky canyon to denser forest with more vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through the forested mountain terrain, moving away from the wolf

entered.detail: dense bushes and small trees covering the left slope
thick underbrush and pine saplings on the right side of the path
small stone structure or rock formation visible at the end of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the wolf and continues along the winding trail as the high rock walls give way to denser forest vegetation on both sides. The path remains rocky and uneven, leading toward a distant structure visible through the trees under the dark stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually opens into a dense, stormy pine forest. It begins by winding along a cobblestone path flanked by steep cliff walls and rocky ledges under a dark overcast sky. As the camera advances, a wolf appears in the trail, standing its ground briefly before stepping aside to let the viewer pass. The scene then shifts as the high rock walls recede, giving way to thick forest vegetation that crowds the uneven path. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the woods, moving toward a distant structure visible through the trees beneath the looming storm.
